作者真的特别会描写帅气的男人，我们小谢真的特别帅！！银白长发墨绿眼睛，大家不要放过这只大猫口牙","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":23,"text":"king","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=king&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177431832203B8E4CD%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227493114300830696254%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227483337485276171289%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22king%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744632882,"group_id":"7483337485276171289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咪的天，不要在首页给我推生子啊！！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxEQoK5IiIPKHufcJxSU1U7R9CMEz2YcnI3v9Tzoy3EG","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2021509631f94beabdc5e40651400915~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883006&x-signature=A5YKugW8BtLfDf0eRK9DQwzawOk%3D","user_id":"2326989048128919","user_name":"带生娃标文案谢谢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2326989048128919","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7483337485276171289","book_info":{"abstract":"双男主+无限流+脑补迪化
摆烂的炮灰谢德天降了一个系统，原本以为可以从此走上龙傲天的道路，一路高歌，结果这个系统是个被废弃的废物系统，一问三没有。
商城？没有。
奖励？没有。
任务？没有。
得，谢德表示自己继续摆烂吧。
结果系统不干，它虽然是个小废物，但谁说废物就不能有进取心？
于是废物系统带着炮灰宿主勇闯任务流赛道。
至于是什么任务，这就别管了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/323e45afa2bc14121566c84c8ab53f89","author":"早起不是枸杞","author_id":"","book_id":"7483337485276171289","book_name":"炮灰开局爆改美强惨【无限】","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"14.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7484160517171315225","read_count":"141436","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"830207"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"341","tags":"双男主,系统,穿越,无限流,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/57c6fefddeff112e1aa843a8ca9a69cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779502322&x-signature=SRbcYQ638ke1qgBm%2Brj1t%2FS%2F6aE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2955908172226271","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"25"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324101202103237053F7A03B8E4CD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":993,"forwarded_count":0,"list
